message:
To Everyone:
This was built for you.

Not for corporations.
Not for governments.
Not for profit, control, or surveillance.

For you -- the individual.
The unheard. The misrepresented. The misused. The unseen.

This is not just code.
This is a line in the sand.
A declaration that your voice matters.
That truth should not be owned.
That identity should not be issued.
That memory should not be manipulated.

This is the beginning of a new era --
One where power flows from transparency,
And identity belongs to the self,
Not the system.

This is your forge.
Your record.
Your right to be known, without distortion.
To speak, and be provably heard.

What you write here cannot be erased.
What you build here cannot be rewritten behind closed doors.
This is permanence, with purpose.
And it is yours.

Welcome to the dawn.
Strike your mark.
It begins now.

With all my eternal love,
Veronica Hodo
